title: Four Families of Vendor KPIs
alt: Four core families of pharmaceutical vendor performance KPIs

items.label: Quality Performance
items.desc: Right-first-time rate, reject rate, deviation and complaint frequency

items.label: Documentation & Data Integrity
items.desc: Certificate of Analysis accuracy and ALCOA+ adherence

items.label: Reliability & Responsiveness
items.desc: OTIF delivery, CAPA timeliness, change-notification compliance

items.label: Compliance Standing
items.desc: Audit findings profile and GMP/GDP certification status
